# Claim Card

## Claim ID

`CLM-...`

## Epistemic Status

R / C / E / A

## Source IDs

- `SRC-...`

## Source Locator

Edition; section/theorem/definition/table/appendix; page if stable.

## Claim Text

State the exact claim being tested.

## Allowed Public Claim

State the strongest publishable wording if tests pass.

## Forbidden Public Claim

State overclaims this result does not support.

## Assumptions

- `ASM-...` or explicit empty list.

## Tests And Oracles

Describe exact checks, small cases, invariants, and property tests.

## Review Status

not_started / in_review / accepted / blocked
